text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In the midst of an unprecedented feng shui boom,
Copano Rickey furthers its popularity through
numerous interviews.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Meanwhile, Hokko Tarumae succeeds in
conquering the Teio Sho, a G1 dirt race. She's
finally received the chance to represent her dear
hometown Tomakomai on a big stage.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
During a TV appearance one day, Copano Rickey
begins to realize that her dream of making
everyone happy through feng shui has come true.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Worried that she may no longer have a reason to
enter races, Copano Rickey channels her energy
into media appearances and interviews.
